title: Rolled Homongenous: Forked
description: Armor blocks for Create: Aeronautics and Create: Big Cannons
body:
YES THE "N" IN HOMONGENOUS IS INTENTIONAL

Port of [Rolled Homogenous](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rolled-homogenous) with permission, originally made by qarsan

Armor and functional blocks intended for Create: Aeronautics and Create: Big Cannons.
All blocks have balanced C:BC resistance and integration to spark on impact.

## Why Use This Mod?

If you're building with Create 1.21.1 and want:

    - More realistic and functional armor options
    - Better interaction with Big Cannons
    - A balanced way to protect your contraptions

…then this mod gives you the tools to do it without breaking gameplay.
